mapper.select: SELECT id, contract_code AS contractCode, contract_name AS contractName, end_date AS endDate, contract_category AS contractCategory, party_b_name AS counterpartName, status, responsible_user_id AS responsibleUserId, 'EXPENSE' AS contractTable FROM biz_expense_contract WHERE end_date BETWEEN #{today} AND #{thirtyDaysLater} AND status NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'SETTLED', 'TERMINATED') AND deleted = 0 AND contract_category IN ('MATERIAL', 'LABOR', 'MACHINE', 'SUBCONTRACT')
